official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the empty Play clientbound update_advancements fixture.
Official binary source for the reset/show booleans and empty collection body branches.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and update_advancements packet id.

field_notes.reset: Primitive boolean fixture; does not prove advancement reset behavior.
field_notes.show_advancements: Primitive boolean fixture; does not prove advancement UI behavior.
field_notes.collections: Added, removed, and progress collections are empty, avoiding advancement holder/progress payloads.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound update_advancements packet framing and dispatch/decode only for reset=false, showAdvancements=false, and empty added/removed/progress collections; do not infer advancement tree, progress, UI, or client-load behavior.
